programs.title: Bananas in Pyjamas
programs.desc: Rat devises a very special horse and cart ride for a tour around Cuddles Avenue for Lulu and Amy, in his converted Ratmobile pulled by two very unusual horses. But when Morgan joins the ride, the load gets too much.

programs.title: Bing MAIN
programs.desc: Sula, Pando and Bing find a bird's nest in their playhouse but learn they cannot both be in it at the same time. So Bing decides to give it to the bird until her chicks have all grown up.

programs.title: Fizzy And Suds
programs.desc: Fizzy and Suds follow a garbage truck, watching bins lifted and rubbish shaken, and see how recycling turns trash into something completely new.

programs.title: Peppa Pig:
programs.desc: Peppa and the family try to get to the playground, but Mr Bull's roadworks block the way.

programs.title: Ready, Steady, Wiggle!
programs.desc: Simon is repeating what everyone is saying today in Wiggle Town. Little Sir Echo has a clever solution: saying echo three times backwards. But how will they get Simon to say the magic words?

programs.title: Shaun the Sheep
programs.desc: The Farmer decides to build a golf course on the farm to impress the local squire.
